name: 42" Clarksburg Round Dining Table Medium Brown - Threshold™
description:
Set up a stylish dining setting with this Clarksburg Round Dining Table from Threshold™. Standing at a 30-inch height, this dining table has a round tabletop atop four pointed legs in a brown finish that lends both support and visual appeal to your entertainment space. Simply add coordinating chairs to create a perfect setup for intimate dinners or family meals.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Width: 42.1 inches
Overall Height: 29.9 inches
Overall Depth: 42.1 inches
Diameter of table top: 42.1 inches
Thickness of table top: 1.2 inches
Distance between floor to under table top: 28.6 inches
Distance between two adjacent legs : 22.7 inches
Distance between between two symmetrical legs: 37.4 inches
Minimum gap between the leg and the floor: 7.9 inches
